purpose: Consume the latest 130600 same-source timeframe rollup while correcting the active denominator toward parent action families instead of more negative full-matrix bookkeeping.

external_sources.name: Maheu, McCurdy, and Song - Components of Bull and Bear Markets
external_sources.use: Bull and bear are parent market families; corrections and bear rallies are subcomponents.

external_sources.name: Zakamulin - Not all bull and bear markets are alike
external_sources.use: Bull/bear regimes can have multiple child states; a flat subtype list is insufficient.

external_sources.name: hidden-regime GitHub
external_sources.use: Open-source reference for Bull, Bear, Sideways, and Crisis style market-regime labels.

external_sources.name: Stock Market Regimes 2000-2026 Kaggle
external_sources.use: Same-source seed panel for Bull, Bear, Sideways, Crisis, and High-Volatility labels.

external_sources.name: Siering, Clapham, Engel, and Gomber - taxonomy of financial market manipulations
external_sources.use: Manipulation should be handled as a direct-event taxonomy, not as an OHLCV child of price regimes.

external_sources.name: Putnins - An Overview of Market Manipulation
external_sources.use: Manipulation varieties include pump and dump, bear raids, painting the tape, spoofing, layering, pinging, and quote stuffing.

external_sources.name: Do and Putnins - Detecting Layering and Spoofing in Markets
Arora et al. - Detecting and Quantifying Wash Trading on Decentralized Cryptocurrency Exchanges
external_sources.use: Wash/self-trade is a direct manipulation variety with replayable DEX order/trade evidence.

parent_taxonomy_candidate.seed_mapping: Map existing Bull same-source daily/weekly/monthly labels here only after explicit crosswalk approval.
Map existing Bear same-source daily/weekly/monthly labels here only after explicit crosswalk approval.
Map existing Sideways labels here only when source confidence or adjudicated range labels are present.
Map existing Crisis labels here as tail-stress seed evidence, not manipulation evidence.
Map existing Mehrnoom/Midsummer/DEX evidence here only by direct variety and support.

local_decision.decision: Keep 130600 as useful same-source timeframe seed data, but do not train the next gate until the parent taxonomy and crosswalk are locked.

next_positive_action: Lock the parent taxonomy/crosswalk first, then train/evaluate one parent class on the 130600 rollup or acquire direct manipulation rows.
